title: Krieg Tightens His Grip on the Baratie
description: On pages 17–19, Krieg’s forces push harder against the Baratie, using numbers, weapons, and intimidation while Sanji and the cooks struggle to hold the line.
scene: The restaurant becomes a battlefield where Krieg’s idea of strength clashes with the Baratie’s pride and the Straw Hats’ refusal to yield.

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: The man who'll rule all the world's oceans!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: I ain't got time to play around with the likes of you!

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: All talk and no substance... useless bastards.

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: CRAP! We're gonna crash into the restaurant!!

summary: This part keeps increasing the pressure on the Baratie and exposes the brutality of Krieg’s command structure.
